summary: Mobile responsiveness bug fix verification for FranchCamp presentation. All 9 slides tested on mobile viewport (390x844) and desktop viewport (1920x800). Mobile fix is working - content no longer cut off, 2-column grid layout on mobile for card slides (3, 7), overflow-y-auto enables scrolling when needed. Rostelecom presentation at / route unaffected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsiveness fix verified. Key findings: (1) FCSlideContainer uses overflow-y-auto for scrolling, (2) Card grids use grid-cols-2 on mobile and lg:grid-cols-4 on desktop, (3) Mobile font sizes reduced via md: and lg: breakpoints, (4) All 9 slides at /franchcamp display correctly on iPhone viewport, (5) Rostelecom at / route has 14 slides and is unaffected by changes.

mobile_responsiveness.slide_3_value: PASSED - 2x2 grid (165px columns), all 4 cards visible
mobile_responsiveness.slide_7_emergent: PASSED - 2x2 grid, all 4 cards + thesis visible
